headline: Planning a trip to Mexico? 5 top travel insurance policies to consider
summary: Getting travel insurance for your trip to Mexico can protect the money you've spent on your plans.

headline: Is It Time To Reassess Booking Holdings (BKNG) After Recent Share Price Volatility?
summary: For investors wondering whether Booking Holdings, at around US$4,179.78 per share, still offers value or whether much of the story is already reflected in the price, this article is designed to help frame that question. The stock has moved around recently, with a 7 day return of 8.0%, a 30 day return showing a 16.4% decline, and a year to date return showing a 21.5% decline, set against a 3 year return of 62.6% and a 5 year return of 79.3%. Recent headlines have focused on Booking Holdings...

headline: Agoda Reveals Malaysians Rank Fourth Among Top Foodie Travelers in Asia
summary: Digital travel platform Agoda has unveiled its ranking of Asian travelers that are the most passionate about culinary experiences during their travels. The findings, derived from a survey of Asian travelers as part of Agoda's 2026 Travel Outlook Report, reveal that Malaysians travelers rank fourth among the top foodie travelers in Asia, with one in three Malaysians citing the discovery of new culinary experiences as a primary reason for travel.
